name: Kuina Sazanami
description: A student in Shiki's class. Though usually appearing brash and tough, she has a motherly fetish that causes her to uncontrollably dote on people she sees as weak and is attracted to. Sazanami soon forces Kiriyama into a relationship under this pretense, much to his dismay. Her Blood Eclipse Release manifests as kickboxing gloves.

name: Maya Yamato
description: __Height:__ 161 cm (5'3") Yamato Maya is a second-year student at Haneoka Girls' High School and the drummer of Pastel*Palettes. She is also classmates with Yukina. Prior to joining the band, Maya was a studio musician. Originally, she wasn't intended to be a member of the band, but was prompted in by Chisato due to their lack of finding a drummer, and after they had seen Maya without her glasses. name: Mayumi Nishikino
description: An office lady who has terrible luck with men, she is the fourth resident that Usa meets. She is always spiteful to everyone, especially those who have found romance or are about to find romance. She tends to drink alcohol heavily when depressed and nags when drunk. She is always on the lookout for something to use against Sayaka and considers Miharu a boxful of Sayaka's weaknesses. She is particularly fond of interfering with Usa and Ritsu's relationship. name: Miu Amaha
description: __Height:__ 146cm Miu is a third-year student of Yuihime Girls' Academy. She lives in a house nearby the school with her mother and two cats. She is the founder and president of the Neko Club, a school club to care for various animals. She works part-time at a maid café named Dolce to earn money for activity of the club; the Neko Club is not official club, so the club's budget is not supplied by the school. name: Miyokichi
description: A mysterious woman who originally worked as a geisha, thanks to Yakumo the 7th's help. She normally supports Kikuhiko by giving him encouragement and watching his rakugo performances.

name: Momoko Sudou
description: A shy girl and Kazusa’s best friend. At first, like the other girls, she becomes interested in relationships with boys. However, as the story progresses, she gradually realizes her true feelings and growing attraction toward other girls. At first, she dismisses it as a misunderstanding about why girls like boys, but eventually she develops a one-sided crush on Sugawara.

name: Non Toyoguchi
description: Non Toyoguchi was a student at Setouchi Keijo Training School. She previously resided in Room 309 before being promoted to the Elite Class. Upon graduating from Setouchi, Non officially becomes a B-Rank Keijo player, affiliated with the Kyushu's Kagoshima Branch. Sometime later, she is able to advance to the A-Rank.

name: Ren Aikawa
description: She is close to Yua Nakabeni and Homi Moegi where she attends a class together with them at Yaegasumi High School. Ren works at the bar. The Bar Master states that there weren't many clients before Ren started to work there. Now, when she works there, the place is extremely busy. Likes 60 denier tights (opaque).

name: Revel
description: Saki's angel. He is rather calculating and manipulative, a trait that is considered by Nasse to be the reason why he was relegated to be a class two Angel, thus capable only of bestowing Saki with the red arrow.

name: Sekke Bronzazza

description: __Height:__ 175 cm Is a member of Clover Kingdom's Green Mantis squad. A magic knight who fought and lost to Asta during their entrance exam. He befriended Asta in order to use him as a stepping stone to show off his powers which he believed to be superior, as Asta appeared to be an incompetent magician. name: Sentouin XX
description: Footsoldier XX or more commonly known as XX is a foot soldier of the Villainous Army who similar to Foot Soldier D, left the Sky Fortress in order to defeat the Dragon Keepers.

name: Shinobu Miyake
description: Ataru's childhood friend and classmate. Until Lum showed up she was also Ataru’s girlfriend. She is a neat, clean, sweet, and petite young lady who can be viewed as the archetypically perfect Japanese female. Not long after Lum showed up Shinobu began to develop super-human strength. She like all female members of her class has a huge crush on Mendou. name: Simon
description: A leading figure in neuroscience who just returned from studying abroad.

name: Takeru Gouda
description: A muscular boy with few expressions who is from class 2-4 and is in the volleyball club. ~!He eventually starts dating Ayaka Kamine and suffers to act mature in front of her.!~

name: Tsuruno Yui
description: A reckless Magical Girl who's full of energy. Tsuruno loves her family, especially her grandfather and great-grandfather, who lead the Yuis to their former prosperity. She fights to become the strongest Magical Girl in order to restore the Yui name.
